# dependency-reviewer

Triage dependency-bot PRs — auto-merge only low-risk bumps, and leave everything risky with a summary for a human.

- **Command:** `/dependency-reviewer`
- **Schedule:** :13,43
- **Source:** none
- **Required inputs:** `bot_author`, `base`
- **Backend:** `claude`

## Inputs

| Input | Default | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `bot_author` | `app/dependabot` | The PR author to triage. GitHub's Dependabot is "app/dependabot"; for Renovate use "app/renovate". Only PRs from this author are ever touched. |
| `base` | `main` | Branch merges target. |
| `bot_marker` | `🤖` | Prefix on every comment this daemon posts, so a human can tell its comments apart. |
| `merge_method` | `squash` | How a merged PR is merged: squash | merge | rebase. |
| `automerge_levels` | `patch`, `minor` | Semver bump levels eligible for auto-merge. A bump above this tier (e.g. major) is never auto-merged — it is summarized and left for a human. Set to ["patch"] to be stricter. |
| `require_green` | `true` | Only auto-merge when CI is fully green. Off would let unchecked bumps merge — a deliberate opt-out, not a default. |
| `high_risk_packages` | `next-auth`, `@auth/*`, `@next-auth/*`, `next`, `react`, `react-dom`, `passport*`, `jose`, `jsonwebtoken`, `oauth*`, `openid-client`, `bcrypt*`, `argon2`, `crypto*`, `helmet`, `csrf*`, `cookie`, `express-session`, `typescript` | Packages that are NEVER auto-merged regardless of bump level — matched against the updated dependency name (case-insensitive substring / glob). Auth, session, crypto, and framework/runtime cores land here: a bump gets a risk summary and waits for a human. Extend per repo in daemon.local.toml. |

## Gate

`discover.sh` decides whether the daemon fires on a given run.

See [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md) for the full prompt.
